articles.headline: Tech stocks rally as Cisco surges and Cerebras jumps on Nasdaq debut
articles.summary: Wall Street’s tech rally continued as Cisco rose sharply after stronger earnings and Cerebras posted a strong first-day performance. The move signals ongoing investor confidence in AI and networking infrastructure, which matters for companies planning cloud spend, AI rollouts, and vendor selection.

articles.headline: Cyberattacks and ransomware remain a major operational threat for businesses
articles.summary: CYFIRMA’s weekly intelligence report highlights ransomware, phishing, vulnerabilities, and data leaks affecting organizations across sectors. For business leaders, the report underscores persistent operational disruption and financial risk, especially for firms with exposed web applications, supply-chain links, or limited incident-response capacity.

articles.headline: IBM report frames 2026 as a year of business accountability for AI
articles.summary: IBM’s business trends report emphasizes that companies are shifting from AI experimentation to accountable deployment tied to financial outcomes. That is relevant for executives because it reflects rising pressure to prove ROI, manage governance, and integrate AI into core operations rather than isolated pilots.
